programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Des admits to Phyllis that he likes Claire. Fred is delighted when Rita agrees to go to York with him. Maureen hears from her solicitor that Reg has accepted her divorce terms

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: DSS men spy on Tricia behind her back. Fred apologises to Rita for his behaviour. Des enjoys winding Derek up. Raquel persuades Betty to let Billy look after the bar

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Butch is afraid to let Zak know about Lisa's husband, Viv tries to ban Donna from speaking to Andy, and Kelly tells Vic that he was the reason she ran away

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Viv apologises to Terry for making his life a misery. Lisa introduces Barry to the Dingles. Frank is told that his company is under investigation by the Inland Revenue

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Ventress goes in search of a bogus water board official who has been robbing the elderly, but ends up investigating a suspicious death linked to one of the burglaries. Meanwhile, Blaketon seeks to rectify a miscarriage of justice by reviving a pre-war darts tournament between the Aidensfield Arms and the White Lion, and Gina begins to get cold feet about her impending marriage to Phil. Rural drama, starring Derek Fowlds and William Simons

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Miss Jones falls for new guest Hilary, a budding playwright who sends Rigsby into fits of jealousy by offering her the starring role in his latest masterpiece. Classic comedy, starring Leonard Rossiter and guest Peter Bowles

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Rigsby splashes out on a new sports car in the hope of impressing Miss Jones, but a cruel practical joke by Philip convinces him he has run over his feline friend Vienna. Leonard Rossiter and Frances de la Tour star

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Tongues are set wagging when the house on the hill changes hands

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: When a business magnate, his wife and their maid are murdered, Miss Marple (Julia McKenzie) is prompted by the circumstances surrounding the incidents to recall the nursery rhyme Sing a Song of Sixpence. She discovers the victims were part of a family tainted by secrets, and as she ponders the significance of the tune, a past scandal reveals itself. Murder mystery, featuring Wendy Richard as feisty cook Mrs Crump, in her final dramatic role. Other guest stars include Prunella Scales, Matthew Macfadyen, Ralf Little, Rupert Graves and Helen Baxendale

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Jenny and Dennis are forced to cut short their honeymoon in Spain, and Gina grows increasingly unhappy at the thought of having to give up her job as pub licensee to marry a policeman. Ventress creates a bad impression at the station, and a crooked travel agent finds a way of cashing in on local holiday-makers' absence, while Vernon organises a Bentley owners' rally at the hall. Sarah Tansey and Duncan Bell star

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Lisa tells Zak that he will have to learn to trust her. Terry tells Viv he loves her and promises to try harder with their relationship. Vic attacks Tom at the Woolpack

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Frank tells Sophie to pack up Kim's belongings and put them in bin bags. Biff and Linda plan a cosy evening together. Betty confronts Tom and tells him how upset she is with him

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ashley fakes illness so he can help Kelly move house, and Vicky is upset when she overhears Jim saying he blames her for leading Steve astray

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ken is alarmed when Kelly asks him to teach her to drive. Tricia is furious when the Post Office refuses to hand over her benefit. Steve tells Liz he blames Vicky for everything

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Ever since a beautiful American woman arrived in the peaceful village of Wychwood-under-Ashe, people have begun to die in a series of apparent accidents. Nobody suspects a killer is at work but, as the body count rises, Miss Marple digs a little deeper with the help of a former policeman - and they gradually unearth a secret that will rock the village to its core. Murder mystery, starring Julia McKenzie, Benedict Cumberbatch, David Haig, Sylvia Syms, Margo Stilley and Hugo Speer

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Jenny and Dennis are forced to cut short their honeymoon in Spain, and Gina grows increasingly unhappy at the thought of having to give up her job as pub licensee to marry a policeman. Ventress creates a bad impression at the station, and a crooked travel agent finds a way of cashing in on local holiday-makers' absence, while Vernon organises a Bentley owners' rally at the hall. Sarah Tansey and Duncan Bell star

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Neville Chamberlain visits Downton for dinner, and is drawn into Violet's plan to save the hospital, with distressing consequences for everyone. Andy finds an unexpected confidante while helping Mr Mason move into Yew Tree Farm, Mary is uncertain if she has met her match, Edith meets Bertie Pelham in London, and Spratt comes to Denker's aid. Mrs Hughes struggles to keep Carson happy, while Mary thinks secrets are being kept from her

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: An international cycling competition comes to the Midsomer village of Burwood Mantle, but when the race leader is murdered, DCI Barnaby and DS Nelson must investigate. During the race's finale, the victim overtook his team-mate to win, leaving the team owner annoyed that he disobeyed his orders, and the rival manager disappointed that his team lost. However, as the pair look into the case, they find themselves drawn into a competitive world of blackmail, bribery and bloodshed, where winning comes at any cost

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The withdrawal of a library book on the day of his death is the only clue to a student's murder. Two people who can be linked to the book give each other an alibi, and the police have their work cut out to identify who is lying. The killer eventually confesses and claims self-defence, forcing Phillips to face up to past demons, while Steel finds himself not only prosecuting the offender but also defending the victim. Freema Agyeman and Ben Daniels star

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Having realised her marriage is a mistake, Rachel is still staying at Janet's and making excuses for her absence, but Sean isn't prepared to accept that things have gone so wrong, so quickly. Meanwhile, the investigation into Joe Bevan continues as the body count rises and the team faces the mammoth task of identifying the victims and determining the order in which they were murdered. Detective drama, starring Suranne Jones, Lesley Sharp and Sean Maguire

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The master of a prestigious college asks Morse to investigate the disappearance of one of his colleagues. The subsequent discovery of a dismembered torso soon has everyone fearing the worst - until the missing man turns up alive and well. Starring John Thaw, Kevin Whately, James Grout, Beatie Edney, Sian Thomas and Barry Foster

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective sets out for Norfolk when a country publican begs him to help solve a murder - but is disappointed when the innkeeper turns out to be a budding author and the killing fictional. However, he soon has food for thought when a real death occurs - committed by a seemingly ghostly hand. Geraldine Alexander and Ian McCulloch guest star, with David Suchet

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Gloomy new tenant Mr Gray moves into Rigsby's boarding house, but proves so depressed that he barely seems to notice the dingy surroundings, and keeps talking about 'going to a better place' - raising fears he is contemplating suicide. Classic comedy, starring Leonard Rossiter and David Swift

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Tired of getting nowhere with Miss Jones, Rigsby switches his amorous attentions to new lodger Marilyn, who turns out to be an exotic dancer - complete with python. Classic comedy, starring Leonard Rossiter, Richard Beckinsale and Don Warrington

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Attempts to scare off Robert's other mother leave him little to crow about

A bitter struggle over plans to demolish homes in a road development ensues, and wild pronouncements from the local psychic ensure tensions in the village of Dunstan remain at fever pitch. Maggie Steed and Ben Crompton guest star

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Three people are murdered in a shop in central London and a fourth is left for dead, and Brooks and Devlin are up against the clock to find a killer who they fear could strike again. When a suspect is brought to trial, Steel's hopes for a relatively straightforward case are dashed when he finds himself pitted against a brilliant defence lawyer. Crime drama, guest starring Rupert Graves and Amanda Root

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When police sergeant Pete Garvey is killed, the investigation proves harrowing for Devlin as he was one of his best friends. The detective discovers the officer had recently been in contact with their childhood parish priest Jonathan Nugent, who Pete claimed sexually abused him as a child. Unable to place a straightforward murder charge against Nugent, Steel and Phillips take an unusual approach to bring him to trial. Guest starring Matthew Marsh, Ruth Gemmell and Patrick Malahide, with Jamie Bamber

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of prison officer Charlie Tyner, Brooks and Devlin discover he had been abusing his position and convicts in his charge. A suspect is brought to trial, but Steel and Phillips go in pursuit of a career criminal connected to Tyner and have to persuade their key witness to give evidence against a man she claims to love. Starring Bradley Walsh, Jamie Bamber, Ben Daniels and Freema Agyeman

programme.title: Barging Round Britain with John Sergeant
programme.desc: The broadcaster travels along the Staffordshire and Worcestershire canal, widely regarded as one of the oldest and prettiest waterways in Britain. On his journey he marvels at ingenious 18th-century engineering, tackles the difficult skill of glassblowing and discovers a secret underground cold war bunker

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Ida and Angie brace themselves for a visit by Robert's 'other mother'. But they're not prepared for following events

programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Only When I Laugh
programme.desc: Glover hides from a vengeful Greek by having his head wrapped in bandages. Hospital comedy, starring Peter Bowles

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar finds a suspicious building in Wales which is being used as a research laboratory, plunging him into the midst of a spine-chilling adventure. Spy drama, directed by and starring Roger Moore

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: King John strips the Sheriff of his power for failing to capture the outlaws, and replaces him with Philip Mark, a man renowned for his ruthlessness. Meanwhile, Nasir encounters a fellow Saracen whose combat skills eclipse his own

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: The duo investigate the killings of a drug dealer and an SI-10 officer and are soon on the trail of an assassin hired by a powerful American crimelord. Drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Apparently successful entrepreneur Clive Cosgrove loses his 'confidence' after Arthur and Terry attend his wedding celebrations. Vintage comedy drama, guest starring Patrick Mower, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: When a foreign student, an apparent cocaine trafficker, is shot dead, Cowley tasks Bodie and Doyle with targetting teenage traffickers who have diplomatic ties with South America. Drama, starring Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins, Gordon Jackson and Alice Krige

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: The Flying Squad foils the hijacking of a security truck before attempting to learn the identity of an informer. Colin Welland guest stars in the hard-hitting police drama, alongside John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar investigates the suspicious deaths of five company directors, who each received a card with the words 'The Scales of Justice' printed on it prior to their demise. However, he finds his inquiries frustrated by the remaining members of the board. Roger Moore stars

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: Much and Scarlet have a frightening encounter with a group of lepers, while Robin rescues a noblewoman from bandits - and learns he is related to his deadly enemy Guy of Gisburne. Dorothy Tutin guest stars

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: The duo probe a colleague's death, which brings to light the officer's investigations into the activities of right-wing extremists

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry is assigned to mind a writer of romantic fiction with a drink problem, whose ex-husband has sold their house behind her back. Beryl Reid and Bill Maynard guest star, alongside George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A notorious hard-nosed villain offers to co-operate with the police and gives himself up in return for protection for his wife and their children, so Bodie and Doyle are assigned to perform the task. Crime drama, starring Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: With Haskins in Toronto, his stand-in DCI Quirk (guest star Bill Maynard) becomes obsessed with catching a gang of thieves. When information is received suggesting the crooks are about to rob a jeweller's shop, officers are poised for action, but events take an unexpected turn as the informant seemingly has a score to settle with Quirk first. Hard-hitting police drama, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Warwick Davis in which a team of five firefighters from Lincoln answer questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge, then tries to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole goes riding in the Yorkshire Dales and tells the story of American motorcycle brand Indian. He also begins the rebuild of his vintage BSA Goldstar

programme.title: World Superbike Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the second round of the season from Circuito de Jerez in Spain, as the championship returned after a five-month hiatus

programme.title: Assassins (1995)
programme.desc: Hitman Robert Rath is planning to quit his lethal profession, especially when he is stalked by a ruthless younger assassin who has no qualms about killing innocent bystanders. But as Rath takes on his last assignment, he decides to protect his intended target after his rival comes gunning for her. Thriller, starring Sylvester Stallone, Antonio Banderas and Julianne Moore

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar investigates a people smuggling ring, focusing his inquiries on the activities of a local yacht club. When it is revealed that one of the immigrants has gone on the run while suffering from smallpox, the Saint sets out to locate him before he can spread the disease

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: The outlaws enter a mysterious village where their every wish is granted - unaware they are being duped by the evil Gulnar, who is intent on reviving a bloodthirsty pagan deity. Jason Connery stars

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: Dempsey comes up against a man who is his equal in all respects. The only difference is that he's on the wrong side of the law. Obsessed with capturing him, Dempsey tests Makepeace's patience to the limit. Will Dempsey succeed against impossible odds?

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur excludes Terry from his latest business venture, prompting him to embark on a search for alternative employment. Comedy drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Doyle is shot by an intruder in his flat, and enters a near coma. Cowley fears a terrorist group - two of whose members were blown up during a recent car chase by CI5 - is responsible. While Doyle experiences surreal dreams involving a ghostly graveyard, Cowley and Bodie attempt to pursue the villain behind the attack. Action drama, with Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A suspect collapses while being questioned and rushed to hospital with injuries likely to have been incurred in an assault. Though innocent, Regan finds himself targeted by the man's vengeful brother who thinks the detective is responsible for his sibling's condition. Gwen Taylor guest stars in the police drama, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.desc: Gabriel Clarke introduces action from the semi-final at Wembley Stadium, which was decided by a penalty shootout. Bob Wilson presented the coverage, with analysis from Glenn Hoddle, Jack Charlton and John Barnes, and commentary by Brian Moore and Kevin Keegan

programme.title: The Sport Gives Back Awards
programme.desc: Jeanette Kwakye hosts the inaugural staging of the awards ceremony from the Royal Institution in London. The event celebrates and acknowledges the many charities, staff and volunteers that focus on improving the lives of others in the UK. The Sport Gives Back Awards is an evening dedicated to recognising those who have excelled in using sport and dance as a vehicle for social change

programme.title: ITV Racing: The Opening Show
programme.desc: Oli bell and the team look ahead to this afternoon's racing from Ascot. Plus, a preview of Sunday's action from Salisbury and Ireland

programme.title: British Touring Car Championship Highlights
programme.desc: Steve Rider presents action from the opening round of the season at Donington Park. With commentary from David Addison and Tim Harvey, and reports by Louise Goodman

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: On the Canada-US border lies a vast lake that hides a dark history. For Native Americans it's an ancient and sacred site, but recently something has risen up from the depths to attack swimmers, and stories abound of an invasion of primordial bloodsuckers. Extreme angler Jeremy Wade plunges into the heart of a waterfall in the Pacific Northwest on a mission to catch the oldest river monster of his career

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin presents live coverage from three venues, featuring four handicaps from Ascot, the Rose of Lancaster Stakes from Haydock Park, and the Sweet Solera from Newmarket

programme.title: Spartacus (1960)
programme.desc: A slave trained to fight as a gladiator turns against his masters and leads an army of rebels in a fight for freedom against the Roman state. But as the rebellion gathers momentum, two senators do all they can to exploit the uprising for their own political ends. Stanley Kubrick's epic, starring the late Kirk Douglas, Tony Curtis, Laurence Olivier, Jean Simmons, Charles Laughton and Peter Ustinov, who won the Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his role as the unctuous Roman businessman Lentulus Batiatus

A gun-toting loner comes to their aid and fights to protect them, while also plotting to take advantage of the situation to pursue a murderous mission of his own. Horror sequel, starring Frank Grillo and Carmen Ejogo

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from the world of All Elite Wrestling, featuring all of the biggest stars on the roster, including Adam Page, Chris Jericho, Cody and Jon Moxley

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A suspect collapses while being questioned and rushed to hospital with injuries likely to have been incurred in an assault. Though innocent, Regan finds himself targeted by the man's vengeful brother who thinks the detective is responsible for his sibling's condition. Gwen Taylor guest stars in the police drama, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Only When I Laugh
programme.desc: Norman is terrified by Figgis's doom-laden anecdotes of operations as a somewhat jaded Dr Thorpe prepares to remove his appendix. Hospital comedy, starring James Bolam, Christopher Strauli and Richard Wilson

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace

programme.title: World Superbike Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the second round of the season from Circuito de Jerez in Spain, as the championship returned after a five-month hiatus

programme.title: The Sport Gives Back Awards
programme.desc: Jeanette Kwakye hosts the inaugural staging of the awards ceremony from the Royal Institution in London. The event celebrates and acknowledges the many charities, staff and volunteers that focus on improving the lives of others in the UK. The Sport Gives Back Awards is an evening dedicated to recognising those who have excelled in using sport and dance as a vehicle for social change

programme.title: ITV Racing: The Opening Show
programme.desc: Oli bell and the team look ahead to this afternoon's racing from Ascot. Plus, a preview of Sunday's action from Salisbury and Ireland

programme.title: British Touring Car Championship Highlights
programme.desc: Steve Rider presents action from the opening round of the season at Donington Park. With commentary from David Addison and Tim Harvey, and reports by Louise Goodman

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: On the Canada-US border lies a vast lake that hides a dark history. For Native Americans it's an ancient and sacred site, but recently something has risen up from the depths to attack swimmers, and stories abound of an invasion of primordial bloodsuckers. Extreme angler Jeremy Wade plunges into the heart of a waterfall in the Pacific Northwest on a mission to catch the oldest river monster of his career

programme.title: ITV Racing Live
programme.desc: Ed Chamberlin presents live coverage from three venues, featuring four handicaps from Ascot, the Rose of Lancaster Stakes from Haydock Park, and the Sweet Solera from Newmarket

programme.title: Spartacus (1960)
programme.desc: A slave trained to fight as a gladiator turns against his masters and leads an army of rebels in a fight for freedom against the Roman state. But as the rebellion gathers momentum, two senators do all they can to exploit the uprising for their own political ends. Stanley Kubrick's epic, starring the late Kirk Douglas, Tony Curtis, Laurence Olivier, Jean Simmons, Charles Laughton and Peter Ustinov, who won the Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his role as the unctuous Roman businessman Lentulus Batiatus

Dick rolls up his sleeves to show Chris how to re-lay and re-point a patio to help make his garden a safe sanctuary for his elderly mum, while Angel teams up with her fellow vintage fan Rachel to breathe life back into an old drinks trolley, using the 17th-century French art of decoupage. programme.desc: Marcel Theroux travels to Japan to meet some of its 'Junior Idols', young girls trying to break into pop stardom by performing in front of adult audiences. He visits the home of an 11-year-old, who is about to make her weekly live web-cast to hundreds of fans, many of whom are middle-aged men. As well as using the web, Yune and other idols perform at live shows, where close by the venues are sexualised images of schoolgirls on everything from adverts to art. The reporter hears claims the Junior Idols is one of number of industries in Japan that has evolved to satisfy the dubious needs of lonely men

programme.title: Travel Man's Greatest Trips

The memories begin with breakfast in Zurich with Frank Skinner, then a perfect macaron in the company of Mel Giedroyc in Paris. In Barcelona, Richard and Kathy Burke took a masterclass in cava and he learned the secrets of chocolate-making in Brussels with Lee Mack. Richard sampled 14 courses of molecular gastronomy with Dawn French in Athens, and in Hong Kong he and Jon Hamm went in search of street food. Along with Paul Rudd, he sampled a local delicacy in Helsinki, and in Russia some space food with Greg Davies and a Soviet-era meal with Rob Beckett

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Chris Tarrant returns for more train journeys through some of the world's most challenging terrain. He heads to the Arctic for a trip along the Alaska Railroad, but as he arrives in the port of Seward, it's not a great start as there are no trains running, so he ends up hitching a ride with a track inspector's car. He continues his journey on a freight train heading for Anchorage, Alaska's biggest city, and finally heads north on the Aurora passenger train to the town of Healy. Along the way he checks out the tiny village of Eklutna, which has great importance for the indigenous inhabitants, and goes for an intrepid fishing trip on a thawing frozen lake

programme.title: The Secret World of Your Rubbish
programme.desc: The waste disposal and recycling documentary follows the work of staff at Dungeness A, a decommissioned nuclear power station in Kent, who have to adopt extreme measures to maintain the site. At the other end of the spectrum are the security team at Stansted Airport, whose job it is to sort through wheelie bins full of prohibited items removed from passengers - with everything from Marmite and motor oil to dead rabbits turning up in hand luggage

programme.title: The Deceived
programme.desc: As the truth about Roisin finally breaks through the web of lies that has been spun between Cambridge and Ireland, Ophelia desperately tries to escape, while the architects of this manipulation attempt to cover their tracks. With Ophelia trapped and cornered in the house at Knockdara, she must finally find the courage to face up to those who have sought to destroy her. Psychological thriller, starring Emily Reid

programme.title: When... Goes Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: Andi Peters narrates a selection of disasters from children's programmes, with contributions by presenters Sally James, Andi Akinwolere, Sarah Greene and Valerie Singleton. programme.title: Greatest Ever Celebrity Wind Ups

Among the tricks highlighted are Ant and Dec springing a surprise on Jamie Oliver in his own restaurant, and Made in Chelsea star Jamie Laing pranks his own mother. Take That's Mark Owen is annoyed by a bogus lawyer, and football manager Jose Mourinho stages an elaborate joke. Includes commentary by singer Amelia Lily, Towie star James 'Diags' Bennewith, weather presenter Laura Tobin and retired athlete Kriss Akabusi

programme.title: Our Yorkshire Farm
programme.desc: Amanda and the children prepare for the demands of breeding season in autumn. However, with Clive recovering from hip surgery and Raven away at university, Amanda and the rest of the children face a particularly demanding set of challenges. The season provides a valuable sex education lesson for Violet and Edith. Reuben studies for his tractor-driving test, Clive buys a new bull, and Clemmy takes a ride on a miniature Shetland

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: Documentary about the work of dedicated animal lovers who save injured and orphaned wild animals brought into their sanctuary

programme.title: House Busters
programme.desc: Janet Ellis and her team of new-age practitioners suggest ways in which changes to homes could positively affect the lives of their owners

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Property expert Ann Maurice and designer Alistair Appleton present a compilation of tips on making a house presentable for sale, including ideas for clearing clutter and creating the illusion of space

programme.title: The Book of Life (2014)
programme.desc: A man who longs to be a musician instead of a bullfighter like his father has to compete with a childhood friend when they fall for the same woman. Their love triangle catches the eye of the spirits of the dead, leading him on a journey through their bizarre world. Animated adventure, with the voices of Diego Luna, Zoe Saldana and Channing Tatum

programme.title: Crack in the World (1965)
programme.desc: A dying scientist and his colleagues conduct experiments to harness the Earth's inner energy that seem set to end in disaster. Sci-fi thriller, with Dana Andrews, Janette Scott, Kieron Moore and Alexander Knox

programme.title: Ice Age: The Meltdown (2006)
programme.desc: Sid the sloth, Manny the mammoth and Diego the sabre-toothed tiger grimly realise the good life is about to come to an abrupt end as flood waters threaten their homes. However, a vulture suggests they could turn an old giant tree into a boat and make their escape, so the three friends set off in search of it. Animated adventure sequel, with the voices of Ray Romano, John Leguizamo and Denis Leary

programme.title: Megamind (2010)
programme.desc: An evil genius finally succeeds in killing the superhero who has foiled his every evil scheme, but finds life without an enemy boring. To fill the gap, he transforms an ordinary man into a worthy adversary - but when his creation turns evil, it falls to the villain to save the world. Animated comedy, with the voices of Will Ferrell, Tina Fey and Brad Pitt

programme.title: The Core (2003)
programme.desc: A chain of bizarre and deadly incidents in several countries leads scientists to the conclusion that the Earth's core has stopped spinning. As chaos erupts around the world, experts hatch a plan to halt the destruction and save the human race - but it involves venturing deep below the planet's surface to detonate a nuclear bomb. Sci-fi thriller, starring Aaron Eckhart, Hilary Swank, Stanley Tucci and DJ Qualls

programme.title: Star Trek Beyond (2016)
programme.desc: The USS Enterprise sets out on a rescue mission which turns out to be a deadly trap set by a mysterious warlord. The crew are left stranded on an unexplored planet, and join forces with a fugitive alien scavenger to find a way off the hostile world and prevent a terrible weapon being unleashed upon the galaxy. Sci-fi adventure, starring Chris Pine, Zachary Quinto and Idris Elba

programme.title: Me and Earl and the Dying Girl (2015)
programme.desc: An awkward teenager shuns all kinds of social interaction, apart from making films with his best friend. His well-meaning mother urges him to spend time with a girl who has been diagnosed with leukaemia, and they unexpectedly develop a firm friendship. However, his life is changed forever as her condition gets worse. Comedy drama based on Jesse Andrews' novel, starring Thomas Mann, RJ Cyler and Olivia Cooke

programme.title: The Daughter (2015)
programme.desc: A man returning home for his father's wedding uncovers a secret that threatens to destroy the lives of those he left behind. Drama, with Paul Schneider and Geoffrey Rush

programme.title: The SpongeBob SquarePants Movie (2004)
programme.desc: The plucky sea creature sets out to prove his boss Mr Krabs is innocent of stealing Neptune's crown. However, the missing item has ended up in sinister Shell City, which all sea-dwellers fear and from which few have ever returned. Animated comedy, with the voices of Tom Kenny, Bill Fagerbakke, Clancy Brown and Scarlett Johansson, plus a cameo appearance by David Hasselhoff

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes (1969)
programme.desc: A second astronaut arrives on the strange simian-dominated world searching for his predecessor. As he journeys into the infamous forbidden zone, he discovers an underground cult of psychic mutants. Meanwhile, a military coup has taken place among the ape society, leading to an inevitable battle. Sci-fi sequel, with James Franciscus, Charlton Heston and Kim Hunter

programme.title: Sunshine on Leith (2013)
programme.desc: Two soldiers return home to the Scottish port town after finishing their tour of duty in Afghanistan. While they struggle to adjust to life as civilians, the parents of one of the squaddies prepare to celebrate their 30th anniversary in style. Musical featuring songs by the Proclaimers, starring George MacKay, Kevin Guthrie, Peter Mullan and Jane Horrocks

programme.title: Night at the Museum: Battle of the Smithsonian (2009)
programme.desc: The living exhibits at New York's Museum of Natural History are shipped to Washington's Smithsonian Institution - along with the artefact that brought them to life in the first place. Nightwatchman Larry tries to retrieve it, only to find the contents of the world's largest museum have been reanimated, including a pharaoh determined to take over the world. Fantasy comedy sequel, starring Ben Stiller, Amy Adams, Owen Wilson and Steve Coogan

programme.title: A Room with a View (1985)
programme.desc: A naive woman accompanies an older cousin on a trip to Florence, where she falls in love with a forward-thinking man. She is forced to cut short the romance and return to a loveless engagement in England, where the object of her affection makes an unexpected appearance. Period drama from James Ivory, based on EM Forster's novel and starring Helena Bonham Carter, Maggie Smith, Denholm Elliott, Daniel Day-Lewis, Julian Sands and Judi Dench

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter (2015)
programme.desc: A medieval warrior thwarts an evil witch queen's plan to wipe out the human race, but is cursed with immortality as a result. In the modern day, he continues to battle evil, and faces his greatest challenge when the sorceress is resurrected to resume her evil plan. Fantasy adventure, starring Vin Diesel, Elijah Wood, Rose Leslie and Michael Caine

programme.title: Everybody Wants Some!! (2016)
programme.desc: College baseball players enjoy a raucous weekend while preparing to start university in 1980. Richard Linklater's comedy, starring Blake Jenner and Juston Street

programme.title: Riddick (2013)
programme.desc: A fugitive is left for dead by his treacherous followers on a dangerous world full of lethal predators. He lures bounty hunters to the planet in the hope of killing them and stealing their spacecraft, but finds himself forced to work with them against an attack by the monsters at the top of the food chain. Sci-fi thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel and Katee Sackhoff

programme.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul (2017)
programme.desc: Youngster Greg Heffley hatches a plot to re-route a family road trip towards a videogame convention. Comedy sequel, starring Jason Drucker, Alicia Silverstone and Tom Everett Scott

programme.title: Horton Hears a Who! (2008)
programme.desc: A kindly elephant hears a cry of help coming from a speck of dust and discovers the minuscule city of Whoville. As he tries to help its citizens, the other animals begin to question his sanity, and the evil Kangaroo incites them to turn against the do-gooder. Animated adaptation of Dr Seuss's book, with the voices of Jim Carrey, Steve Carell, Carol Burnett, Seth Rogen and Will Arnett

programme.title: The Pink Panther Strikes Again (1976)
programme.desc: Inspector Clouseau fends off a murder syndicate led by his former police chief Dreyfus, who has been driven insane by his hatred for the bungling detective. However, doing away with the lucky lawman proves harder than anticipated - even for the world's best assassins. Comedy sequel, starring Peter Sellers, Herbert Lom, Lesley-Anne Down, Burt Kwouk and Leonard Rossiter

programme.title: Evolution (2001)
programme.desc: Two science teachers investigate a mysterious meteor and discover it is oozing a strange fluid containing millions of minuscule but rapidly evolving organisms - which start to turn into terrifying alien monsters with a taste for human flesh. Sci-fi comedy, starring David Duchovny, Orlando Jones, Julianne Moore, Seann William Scott, Dan Aykroyd and Ted Levine

programme.title: The Imitation Game (2014)
programme.desc: Biopic of mathematician Alan Turing, whose work during the Second World War translated seemingly unbreakable Nazi codes as well as pioneering the development of computer technology. In the years following the war, his life would be destroyed as his homosexuality was discovered, leaving him facing criminal charges. Starring Benedict Cumberbatch, Keira Knightley and Charles Dance

programme.title: Spy (2015)
programme.desc: A deskbound CIA agent provides valuable background support for a dashing secret agent, but has never gone into action herself. Everything changes, when the spy mysteriously vanishes, and she leaps into action to take his place, infiltrating the inner circle of a ruthless arms dealer and trying to avert a global catastrophe. Comedy adventure, starring Melissa McCarthy, Jason Statham and Rose Byrne

programme.title: Crank 2: High Voltage (2009)
programme.desc: Hitman Chev Chelios sets off in pursuit of a Chinese mobster who has removed his heart and replaced it with a machine requiring regular jolts of electricity to keep it working. As he tries to locate his missing organ, he must resort to increasingly elaborate methods of obtaining the necessary voltage to stay alive. Action thriller sequel, starring Jason Statham, Amy Smart, Dwight Yoakam and Efren Ramirez

programme.title: The Hallow (2015)
programme.desc: A conservationist moves to Ireland with his family, making a new home in a remote house near a forest. He finds the house is infested with a sinister fungus, but worse is to come when the woods unleash a terrifying array of supernatural creatures from local folklore. Horror, starring Joseph Mawle, Bojana Novakovic and Michael Smiley

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly complains that Pops is spending too much time with her at home, so Murray takes him to work at the furniture shop. Meanwhile, Adam reluctantly gives away his old toys in an effort to make him look more grown up, hoping it will result in a kiss with Dana. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly is pitted against a rival mother when she tries to micro-manage Barry and Erica's search for college places, while Erica tells Pops that she has tried to enhance her prospects by lying about her extracurricular activities. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from in and around Bristol - fitness fanatics Billy and Tasha, music-loving Dennis and Tina, and former news reporter Keith and his wife Jane, compete for the prize

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Beauty therapist Maria is a perfectionist, placing her dream of a country house wedding in the hands of her prankster fiance, Sam

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The night of the reunion dinner party brings everyone back together for the first time in two months. There is laughter and joy at being reunited with friends

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Ryder pretends he is a college student so he can date one of Zander's room-mates, and Mel is less than pleased when Joe inherits a chair from his grandmother. Meanwhile, Lennox and Zander avoid discussing their feelings for each other. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel thinks she might be pregnant, but is unsure how to tell Joe, who is in the middle of preparing for an important business pitch. Meanwhile, Ryder forms a study group with an eclectic mix of people, and Lennox and Zander get their wires crossed

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Boyle investigate an old case belonging to Hitchcock and Scully from the 1980s. Santiago's uniformed officers and Jeffords' detectives fight over limited resources at the precinct building

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Gina attend their 20th anniversary high-school reunion. Back at the precinct, Boyle helps Diaz with a decision about her love life. Meanwhile, Holt, Jeffords, Hitchcock and Scully attempt to identify the mystery sound in a radio show competition

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Dr Sturgis recommends Sheldon and Missy for a university research study on twins. but Mary is unhappy when the test results go to Sheldon's head. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Mary clashes with Sheldon's drama teacher over plans for a Halloween fundraiser for the church. Georgie falls for a rebellious teenage girl that Sheldon is tutoring

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: A jealous Leonard argues with Penny when she invites one of her male friends to stay at her apartment while he is in town. Unfortunately, the row brings up unpleasant memories for Sheldon of watching his warring parents, causing even more tension between the friends. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard go camping to watch the Leonid meteor shower, but the trip takes an unexpected turn thanks to some specially baked cookies. Meanwhile, Penny injures herself in the shower, and with the rest of the gang out of town, it's left to Sheldon to come to her aid

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel is less than thrilled when her honeymoon to Tahiti is cancelled because she has broken her leg, so Joe surprises her with a romantic getaway to a lakeside cabin. However, things go awry and their dream holiday quickly becomes a nightmare. Lennox is unsure about whether to continue her new relationship with Marco and tries to keep it a secret. Comedy, with Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe refuses to allow Dani out on a date with a boy from school, so she tricks Mel into taking her along instead. Lennox and Marco's relationship is revealed when they run into Zander, and a new rivalry erupts between the two men over an internship with an artist

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray coaches Barry for his first high school wrestling match but keeps it a secret from Beverly, who is sure to disapprove of her son taking part in such a dangerous sport. Adam blackmails Erica into waiting in line with him to buy tickets for the new Stars Wars movie

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray gets his moment in the spotlight when he is honoured by his old high school for his basketball prowess. While he and Beverly are away from home, Barry takes advantage of their absence to throw a party to impress his school friends

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Work has become so busy for Peralta and Santiago that they end up celebrating their first wedding anniversary while standing guard over a comatose drugs baron who has been rushed into hospital after being shot

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Captain Holt and Peralta investigate when three valuable antique coins are stolen from the university where Kevin works as a lecturer. Meanwhile, back at the precinct, Jeffords and Santiago get competitive about taking the squad out for lunch

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The young genius and Dr Sturgis fall out for the first time when Dr Sturgis marks a question as wrong on Sheldon's test paper. Meanwhile, Mary takes over Pastor Jeff's duties when he's off sick

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The youngster boycotts his favourite bread company when the taste of his favourite loaf changes, but matters soon get out of control. Meanwhile, Georgie tries to console Veronica after breaking up with her boyfriend

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends fight over a ring they believe was used in the Lord of the Rings film trilogy. Leonard hopes to return the item to its rightful owner - but Raj wishes to sell it so he can buy a jet ski, and Sheldon develops a Gollum-like obsession with the precious object

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is awarded a prestigious prize by the university, but is scared of collecting the gong at a ceremony because he knows he'll have to give a speech. Penny tries to gee him up with rousing references to X-Men, and Leonard and Raj offer psychological guidance - without much success

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Haiesha Mistry and Ruby O'Donnell look back at Lisa Hunter's self-harm storyline in 2002. Lisa's dad, Les, is suspicious of the children, and Becca seduces Jamie

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Two months since the experiment ended, everyone is back together again for a reunion, and after last night's explosive dinner party, the couples gather one last time to reflect on their journeys. For some it's a chance to re-live the highs and update us on their relationships, but for those who parted on a sour note, it's the final opportunity to confront their exes and gain closure

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The boys want to become more sporty, so Barry Kripke leads them in a fencing lesson, while Penny, Amy and Bernadette help Stuart, who wants to attract more female customers to the comic-book store

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy's attempts to celebrate her birthday with an intimate night at home are interrupted by the news that Bernadette has gone into labour. However, it transpires that Howard, Raj and Stuart may have rushed the expectant mother to the hospital too early, with Raj having difficulty keeping the gender of the unborn child a secret

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After spending the holidays apart, the gang get together to hear about Sheldon's and Amy's trip to his mother's, Leonard and Penny recall their Christmas tree adventure, and Howard and Bernadette open up about their first days as parents

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon passes his driving test, so the lads decide to take a trip to a theme park. However, things start to go wrong when their route is obstructed by a funeral cortege and the newly qualified motorist has an accident in the car park. Later, Will regrets ever making the journey when he disgraces himself on a rollercoaster

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will discovers that attending a mixed-sex school is not so bad after all when he manages to get a date with the most popular girl in the year above. However, his growing obsession with her begins to alienate him from his friends. Comedy, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Willow feels threatened when Oz is attracted to singer Veruca. When he escapes from his cage on the full moon, he learns that Veruca is also a werewolf. However, she allows her animal side to run wild and tries to seduce him into doing the same. As he gives in to temptation, Willow is driven to seek magical vengeance on her rival

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Spike is held prisoner by a mysterious military organisation, but manages to escapes, only to find he has been experimented on - with shocking consequences. Meanwhile, Riley tries to muster up the courage to ask Buffy out, but when they both learn Spike is on the loose, they must leap into action - while trying to keep their secrets from each other

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: The duo are summoned by superhero team the Vindicators to thwart their arch-nemesis Worldender, but they wind up snared in a death trap conceived by Drunk Rick

programme.title: Robot Chicken
programme.desc: Twisted comedy co-created by Seth Green

programme.title: The Jellies!
programme.desc: Barry reluctantly attends his high school reunion. Adult animation about a family of jellyfish and their human son

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: The duo visit another planet to purchase wiper fluid and witness an annual event where the local populace commits crimes for one night without consequence. Jerry and Summer work on their father-daughter relationship, but his lack of employment keeps coming up

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard returns from his research expedition in the North Sea and undergoes an adjustment period with Sheldon. Howard experiences an unusual emotional reaction as a result of his relationship with his mother. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends compete in a scavenger hunt designed by Raj to test their scientific knowledge and life skills, but the game brings out the best and worst in everyone. As the hunt progresses, Howard and Amy begin to bond over their shared musical tastes, while Penny and Sheldon work together as a team and Bernadette becomes fiercely competitive

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon passes his driving test, so the lads decide to take a trip to a theme park. However, things start to go wrong when their route is obstructed by a funeral cortege and the newly qualified motorist has an accident in the car park. Later, Will regrets ever making the journey when he disgraces himself on a rollercoaster

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will discovers that attending a mixed-sex school is not so bad after all when he manages to get a date with the most popular girl in the year above. However, his growing obsession with her begins to alienate him from his friends. Comedy, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Beauty therapist Maria is a perfectionist, placing her dream of a country house wedding in the hands of her prankster fiance, Sam

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from in and around Bristol - fitness fanatics Billy and Tasha, music-loving Dennis and Tina, and former news reporter Keith and his wife Jane, compete for the prize

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam plans to attend the school dance with Dana, and reluctantly agrees to take dancing lessons with Beverly. Meanwhile, Murray is forced to have the 'talk' with Adam, but he admits that he hasn't spoken to Barry about sex yet. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam worries that sexual tension may develop between him and his long-time friend Emmy. Beverly is caught reading Erica's diary, and vows to trust her daughter instead of snooping in future. However, her new faith is soon taken advantage of. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Liverpool, Jude and her husband Malcolm hope a selection of their restaurant favourites will win them the prize. However, as the evening pans out, Malcolm turns out to be less of a help and more of a hindrance. On day two, Kelsey and Chris hope to spice up their guests' lives with a Mexican fiesta. A confession from Malcolm about what he gets up to while Jude is at the bingo leaves her fuming, and Elisa's revelation about a celebrity crush leaves her boyfriend Alan speechless. The final hosts, Alan and Elisa, have dished out blunt feedback all week, so their guests could be out for revenge

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Laid-back south Londoner Daniel wants to get his wedding grooving like a Caribbean street carnival. However, sensible student bride Sabrina dreams of a more traditional occasion and a wedding her parents will be proud of. While Sabrina pictures a tranquil location, Daniel splashes the cash on trucks and sound systems

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Two months since the experiment ended, everyone is back together again for a reunion, and after last night's explosive dinner party, the couples gather one last time to reflect on their journeys. For some it's a chance to re-live the highs and update us on their relationships, but for those who parted on a sour note, it's the final opportunity to confront their exes and gain closure

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Lennox helps Ryder get creative on a job application. Meanwhile, Mel plans the perfect wedding for her friend Carrie (Vicki Davis), but when she suddenly calls off the big day, Mel debates whether she should keep the flowers, catering and venue for her and Joe. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel and Joe meet with their minister to discuss their relationship, and try to prove that everything between them is perfect. However, when they look back on their time together, they decide that honesty is not always the best way. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Gina spends time with each member of the squad, playing a high-stakes game of chess with Captain Holt, going out for a fancy lunch with Diaz and Santiago, infiltrating an expensive social club with Peralta and finding special gifts for the team

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jeffords believes the Pontiac Bandit is up to his old tricks and stealing cars again, but Peralta is convinced he's wrong and attempts to prove it. The rest of the squad battles to keep Shaw's bar a police hangout after some firefighters stake their claim to it

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The eccentric youngster gets into trouble with fellow child genius Paige at the Science Museum, while George Sr is forced to play therapist to Paige's bickering parents, Barry and Linda. Mary, Georgie and Missy help Meemaw to set up a jumble sale in her garage

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: When Meemaw gives Sheldon his first video game, it soon takes over their lives. Meanwhile, George Sr becomes jealous when Georgie bonds with Herschel from the car workshop. US comedy, starring Iain Armitage and Annie Potts

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard's fear of commitment causes him to avoid Bernadette, but he soon realises he has made a mistake and tries to compensate for it. Meanwhile, Kripke plays a prank during a radio interview with Sheldon, who sets out to get revenge, only to be caught by the Dean. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star, with an appearance by Katee Sackhoff (Battlestar Galactica) as herself

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette asks Leonard about his physics experiment, making Howard so jealous that she threatens to end their relationship. Penny also feels put out by the situation, and asks Sheldon to teach her about science. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Melissa Rauch star

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe wants to start a family and invites Nate and Gillian round, hoping their baby will be enough to convince Mel she is ready to handle the responsibility. Meanwhile, Lennox plays matchmaker for Zander and Ryder reveals plans to move to Louisiana

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: The family gathers around the laptop to video chat with Ryder in New Orleans on his 18th birthday, but the computer crashes before they get the chance to talk. Joe insists that he can fix it, but Mel is convinced they need to employ an expert to repair it. Dani asks Lennox for advice on matters of the heart but doesn't follow her words of wisdom. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam tries to express his feelings for Dana by making her a mix tape, but disaster strikes when the tape falls into Beverly's hands. Barry obtains a fake ID and takes it to school to show off to his classmates. David Spade (Rules of Engagement) guest stars, with Sean Giambrone, Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam is disappointed to be cast in a minor role in the school musical, so Beverly helps him to land a leading part in a competing show. Barry falls out with his father when Murray insists on leaving sporting events early to beat the traffic. Ana Gasteyer (Suburgatory) guest stars

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and the squad must track down a hacker who has infiltrated the precinct's servers, compromising protected information on undercover agents. Rosa deals with relationship issues, while Hitchcock and Scully attempt to cook the perfect lasagne

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Jeffords becomes anxious about his upcoming lieutenant's exam, Peralta, Captain Holt and the squad decide to distract him from the stress by holding the precinct's annual Halloween Heist on a new date, Cinco de Mayo

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The youngster becomes inspired by his hero Albert Einstein and tries to play the violin. Mary thinks that she may be pregnant and goes to buy a pregnancy test with Meemaw

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The young genius moves in with Dr Sturgis for a night to see what it would be like to leave home and go to college. During his absence, a lonely Mary tries to bond with other members of the family

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard tells Penny he loves her, but fails to get the response he would have liked. Sheldon also finds himself competing against Star Trek: The Next Generation actor Wil Wheaton once again when the gang goes bowling - and tries to get his revenge

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to hide the fact he had dinner with Penny after she broke up with Leonard, hoping to stay friends with her. However, keeping secrets does not prove to be his strong point, and it isn't long before his deceit is exposed. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Haiesha Mistry and Ruby O'Donnell look back at Lisa Hunter's self-harm storyline in 2002. Brian tells Lisa he cannot handle the fact that she has been self-harming

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: In a feature-length episode, groom Andy plans an authentic Ukrainian wedding in Ukraine for his fiancee Anna, hoping to impress his bride-to-be and her mother. Will Andy's big wedding abroad be a hit with Anna, or will it all get lost in translation?

programme.title: The Other Woman (2014)
programme.desc: A woman is devastated to learn her boyfriend is actually married, but when she meets his wife, they quickly become friends. When they discover he has a third secret lover, they decide to join forces and teach him a lesson. Comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Leslie Mann, Kate Upton and Nikolaj Coster-Waldau

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Buffy's Thanksgiving dinner is interrupted by a Native American spirit seeking vengeance for the wrongs done to his tribe a century ago. Angel comes back to Sunnydale but keeps his presence a secret, while a desperate Spike is forced to seek protection from his old enemies

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Willow is still pining for Oz, and resorts to magic to make her heartbreak go away. However, the spell causes anything she says to come true instead. A series of offhand remarks causes Giles to go blind, Xander to be pursued everywhere by demons, and Buffy and Spike to fall madly in love and begin planning their wedding. Meanwhile, Anya's demonic mentor takes an interest in the chaos she has caused

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon introduces Amy to Raiders of the Lost Ark - one of his favourite films - and is distraught when she ends up pointing out a plot hole that ruins the whole story. Meanwhile, Leonard realises he can manipulate Penny into feeling sorry for him when his mother publishes a reveal-all book about his childhood problems. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon re-evaluates the time he spends with Amy when she takes a job at the university. Meanwhile, Howard is forced to sleep on his friend's sofa after he gets into an argument with Bernadette. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Simon Helberg and Mayim Bialik

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, including Your Questions to the PM: #BBCAskThis, I'm a Celebrity, The Andrew Marr Show, Dynasties, Mrs Wilson, The Apprentice and A Hotel for the Super Rich & Famous

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Panel show hosted by Jimmy Carr, with regular team captain Rob Beckett and guest captain Kerry Godliman joined by Nish Kumar, Natasia Demetriou, Fred Sirieix and Judi Love

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Laid-back south Londoner Daniel wants to get his wedding grooving like a Caribbean street carnival. However, sensible student bride Sabrina dreams of a more traditional occasion and a wedding her parents will be proud of. While Sabrina pictures a tranquil location, Daniel splashes the cash on trucks and sound systems

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Liverpool, Jude and her husband Malcolm hope a selection of their restaurant favourites will win them the prize. However, as the evening pans out, Malcolm turns out to be less of a help and more of a hindrance. On day two, Kelsey and Chris hope to spice up their guests' lives with a Mexican fiesta. A confession from Malcolm about what he gets up to while Jude is at the bingo leaves her fuming, and Elisa's revelation about a celebrity crush leaves her boyfriend Alan speechless. The final hosts, Alan and Elisa, have dished out blunt feedback all week, so their guests could be out for revenge

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef tries to transform the fortunes of Sebastian's, a pizzeria in Burbank, Los Angeles, which is failing to attract customers, leaving the owner in debt and struggling to support his family. Gordon is horrified to discover pre-processed and frozen ingredients on the menu, but there seems to be little he can do to help when he is thrown out of the kitchen

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef tries to change the fortunes of Finn McCool's, a traditional Irish pub in the Hamptons, New York. The chances of the establishment becoming a success are being ruined by the owner Buddy Mazzio's two sons, bartender Jason and chef Brian, who are constantly fighting with each other, prompting Gordon to have a heart-to-heart with the family

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Thrill junkie Lee plans to push his unadventurous bride Aimee to the extreme with a wedding that would send most brides over the edge. While Aimee wanted to play it safe with a picturesque traditional event, Lee hopes she'll take a leap of faith to be his wife

However, sensible student bride Sabrina dreams of a more traditional occasion and a wedding her parents will be proud of. programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Jo Frost helps a family with six fiercely independent children to bring some order to their lives, in particular, helping the older kids to deal with the death of their father

programme.title: Kubo and the Two Strings (2016)
programme.desc: A boy unwittingly summons an evil spirit to wreak havoc on his peaceful village home. The only hope of defeating the vengeful creature is to find a magical suit of armour belonging to the boy's father - but finding it will entail matching wits with an assortment of monstrous foes. Animated adventure, with the voices of Charlize Theron, Art Parkinson and Matthew McConaughey

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel is not so thrilled when Joe's mother Gloria drops by, but her fiance saves his anger for when his estranged brother Tony turns up and expects to be able to stay. Meanwhile, Lennox insists on helping Ryder get into college when he misses the application deadline. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: The weekend of Mel and Joe's wedding draws closer, but things are running far from smoothly as Joe is injured at his own bachelor party and Mel's father is missing. Meanwhile, Zander sees his friend make a move on Lennox. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe is forced to quickly make a decision that could affect his and Mel's marriage after his new wife drops a bombshell at the ceremony. Meanwhile, Lennox is caught between Zander and Marco, and Ryder struggles to find the right time to make an announcement about college

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As the academic year comes to a close, Barry and Erica wonder how they will appear in the school yearbook and pressure Adam, who is on the team producing it, to see the rough layout before it goes to print. Murray is annoyed when Marvin pays a visit to ask for money. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica cannot wait to get out of the house as Graduation Day approaches - until it dawns on her how much her mother's affection means to her. Barry's plans for a summer with Lainey turn to dust, while Dana makes an unexpected visit. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Hayley Orrantia

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly and Murray help Erica move into her college dormitory, while Adam tries to find the perfect girlfriend for Barry

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam has to tackle a school project on the Second World War, so decides to make a film featuring his grandfather. However, Pops takes matters into his own hands when Adam finds all his war stories mundane. Erica fails to cope with her own cooking and laundry at college and returns home to confront Beverly for over-mothering her, but Murray insists that Beverly starts to teach Erica and Barry basic life skills

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While the girls go to Disneyland and get made up as princesses, the guys have to promote science as a career option for women at Howard's old middle school. Meanwhile, Raj and Lucy have their first date in a library, where instead of speaking to each other they send text messages

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette and Howard host a dinner party, but as it falls on Sheldon's Thai food night, he opts to bring his own dinner. As punishment for his lack of manners, the gang decides he should organise Wolowitz's cluttered wardrobe, but he discovers an unopened letter from Howard's father, who hasn't made contact in years

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys compete for a tenured professor position at the university, leading them to try to win over the committee in charge of appointing a new staff member, and arguing about who deserves the spot the most. However, the panel includes Mrs Davis from Human Resources, whom Sheldon has crossed paths with before. Guest starring Regina King

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy tries to help Sheldon get over his desire for closure when one of his favourite TV shows is cancelled on a cliffhanger ending. Raj discovers his new girlfriend Lucy has a blog in which she has written about him, and is upset when he learns she believes he has feminine qualities, causing him to worry about their relationship

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon discover their favourite childhood TV science show host Professor Proton can be booked for private parties and decide to hire him to entertain them. Meanwhile, Raj asks Howard and Bernadette to look after his dog for the weekend, but the couple panic when the canine goes missing. Guest starring Bob Newhart

programme.title: The Adventures of Tintin (2011)
programme.desc: A reporter's purchase of a model ship brings him under threat from a ruthless criminal, as it is one of a series of clues to the location of the real vessel, which holds a pirate's lost treasure. He sets off on a globetrotting quest to find it, assisted by a drunken sea captain, two bumbling detectives and his faithful dog. Steven Spielberg's animated adventure based on Herge's comic-strip series, with the voices of Jamie Bell, Andy Serkis and Daniel Craig

programme.title: True Lies (1994)
programme.desc: A seemingly ordinary computer salesman leads a double life as a secret agent battling international terrorism. His naive wife is unaware of his dual employment, and goes in search of adventure - only to end up in the clutches of terrorists who have stolen a nuclear weapon. James Cameron's action comedy, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Jamie Lee Curtis and Tom Arnold

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox USA
programme.desc: A rolling cast of famous faces in the US turn their hand to being the country's most opinionated viewers as they critique the week's TV. Shows watched include Undercover Boss, Floor Is Lava, Jersey Shore: Family Vacation, Dating Around, Selling Sunset, and Taken

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, including Death by Magic, I'm a Celebrity Get Me Out of Here!, Dynasties, The Chase: Celebrity Special, This Morning, Mrs Wilson, and How to Spend It Well with Phillip Schofield. First aired in December 2018

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Voiceover artist Nick, 62, is set up on a date with 52-year-old golfer Laura, and 22-year-old Jordan, a boxer for Team Great Britain, meets 23-year-old Thai boxer Chloe. Elsewhere, telecoms analyst Ketan, who has high-functioning autism and has been reluctant to reveal it to any potential partner, goes on a date with Brodie

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: As Britain gears up for the royal wedding, the restaurant opens its doors to a new group of singletons hoping to find love like Harry and Meghan. History student Abbie is a descendant of Henry VIII but is hoping to find someone much nicer than her horrible ancestor. Butler Kit wants to meet a man who shares his passion for the royal family, and will football-mad James get the royal seal of approval from Kate Middleton lookalike Jodie?

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Thrill junkie Lee plans to push his unadventurous bride Aimee to the extreme with a wedding that would send most brides over the edge. While Aimee wanted to play it safe with a picturesque traditional event, Lee hopes she'll take a leap of faith to be his wife

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance for viewers to purchase goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: In this bite-sized episode, Kirstie Allsopp plans to surprise her guests with two main courses - roast beef with mulled wine gravy, and masala cauliflower with coconut stuffing for the vegetarians

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Property experts Jasmine Harman and Sara Damergi help Nathan and Georgina Spender, who are hoping to invest some money they inherited from their parents by downsizing in Leicestershire and buying a property in Lanzarote that they can initially use for holidays, with a view to eventually making it their permanent home

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The programme heads to Lowestoft in Suffolk, where Henry Cole picks a valuable Lyons Tea enamel sign while Simon O'Brien converts a station trolley into a garden sofa

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team rummage through the hangar of a Vulcan bomber, where Henry finds a cockpit seat to restore, and Simon attempts to turn part of a jet engine into a coffee table

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Belinda travels to Dick and Angel's chateau so that Angel can teach her the art of decoupage on a classic 1950s family dressing table. It's changeover day at Krys and Tim's chateau, as they sweat it out in 42-degree heat to get their 20-room chateau ready for their next booking. Budding chateau owners Elaine and David visit a 19th-century chateau with 18 rooms and two gîtes in Normandy

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton heads to Pembrokeshire to help Graham and Dorothy build an upside-down eco-house by the sea. Although they are not fans of DIY and have no self-build experience, the couple plan to complete their new home in just 20 weeks, but they are left wondering if they have taken on too much

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at the Swan Inn in Pontfadog, a village in the Ceiriog Valley in Wrexham. Ian and Cathy McNeill take their guests trout fishing, and round the day off with a meal in their own restaurant with entertainment from a traditional tenor. However, the next morning is not so harmonious as the guests jostle for access to the only available shower

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves to Bournemouth, where owners John and Chris Griffith welcome their guests to the Bed & Breakfast by the Beach. The visit gets off to a bad start when hyper-critical Jill is reduced to tears by the discovery that her room does not have a smoke alarm, and the tension continues to mount at dinner, where the hosts regale their guests with racy tales

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to the Lansbury in Whitby, North Yorkshire. All the guests are keen to have a good look around their rooms after falling victim to owner Jill Winspear's criticism earlier in the week - but her attempts at a guided tour backfire, and the breakfast service fails to impress

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The group's final destination is Charlie and Angie Hobson's Castle House in Denbigh, north Wales. Some of the guests are unimpressed by a day trip to a local spa - but back at the B&B, the previously critical Jill is full of praise

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The four sets of owners discover what the other competitors thought of their businesses by opening the cash-filled envelopes, having put in what they believed their hosts should receive. They meet for one last time to learn who has been declared the best value B&B of the week

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Chester's 18 chimpanzees face upheaval when new female chimp Vila arrives from a zoo in Germany. Meanwhile, nine-year-old cheetah mum Kinky Tail is vomiting after meals, and her three-year-old daughter Safi must watch and wait as her mum is taken to the zoo's medical centre. Cameras also follow Asian short-clawed otter Annie, who recently gave birth to a large litter of five pups

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A woman and her sons bring in their springer spaniel puppy for complicated surgery on its badly deformed hind leg. The owner of an eight-year-old cocker spaniel waits to hear if her dog's cancer has spread, and the vet treats a two-year-old cat, which is dragging one of its back legs

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick and Angel invite Tim and Krys over to their place as Dick shows Tim how to put on a gourmet weekend, and Angel has a heart-to-heart chat about chateau-living with Krys. Lee wrestles with a curtain in the shower room on arrival day for his and Belinda's first paying guests. Plus, Angela and Steve invite eight friends over to test-run their tandem holiday business

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud revisits Andy and Nicky Bruce, who were building an experimental amphibious house on a small island on the Thames in Buckinghamshire. They spent £1.2million on one of the most ambitious Grand Designs ever, but the logistical headache of building on an island only accessible by a narrow footbridge soon became clear. Heavy machinery was swept away by the river, contractors were changed, and the site was hit by severe storms, causing delays and resulting in an unfinished and untested building. Kevin returns to find out what living on a regularly flooded piece of land is like, and whether the floating home performed when the river burst its banks in January 2015

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: A woman who has been badly cut in a Saturday night pub fight endures an agonising wait for medical care, while medics attend a habitual caller who has requested help rather than use medication to control his symptoms - one of many non-urgent cases handled by Wiltshire's ambulance service

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Consultant Emer Sutherland helps treat an eight-year-old who has fallen 8ft onto concrete while riding his BMX, losing his front teeth and possibly injuring his head and spine. A 19-year-old motorcyclist who hit a bollard requires urgent treatment on his leg, which may otherwise need to be amputated, and X-rays of a stabbing victim yield startling results

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the popular quiz as Sean Lock and Henning Wehn compete against Jon Richardson and Victoria Coren Mitchell. Tom Allen joins the show's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters with 'help' from Joe Wilkinson

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The priests organise a raffle to raise funds to repair their leaky roof, planning to award a car as the prize. Unfortunately, Ted accidentally wrecks it before the grand draw takes place, and embarks on a frantic search for a replacement. Dermot Morgan and Ardal O'Hanlon play the Craggy Island clerics

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Craggy Island's most famous religious relic is due to be upgraded and Ted sets about trying to ensure the ceremony runs smoothly. However, Dougal and Jack put his plans in jeopardy when they meet the three priests in charge of proceedings. Comedy, starring Dermot Morgan
